meta.label: Add members to a Microsoft Entra ID group
meta.description: Add members to a Microsoft Entra ID group. A column containing Entra ID users GUIDs are required. Entra ID application used by this plugin has to be owner of the Entra ID group.

params.name: group_id
params.label: Entra ID group GUID
params.description: GUID of the Microsoft Entra ID group

params.name: user_id_column
params.label: Input dataset Entra ID users column
params.description: Column containing Entra ID user GUIDs
